payload.title: RBI keeps liquidity tight
payload.text: RBI commentary highlighted inflation vigilance. Repo rate guidance may influence bond yield and NIFTY movement in India.

payload.title: Oil rises
payload.text: Crude oil prices climbed this week and economists warned of imported inflation risk for India.

payload.title: NIFTY closes lower
payload.text: NIFTY fell amid concerns that bond yield and inflation could remain elevated after RBI communication.
